'''鈭歾h-f-p-w''' ('''kazhafpewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobe|jobe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobe|jobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-f-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazhafpewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhafpewoko|thizhafpewoko]] || [[word:jizhafpewoko|jizhafpewoko]] || [[word:shizhafpewoko|shizhafpewoko]] || [[word:kizhafpewoko|kizhafpewoko]]
|-
